title: Nebula: Lib
description: A library that makes game setup easier: config system, creature relationships, attributes, and mod compatibility.
body:
**Nebula: Lib** is a library that simplifies mod development and the configuration of interactions between different mods in the Nebula series.



**Available features:**

- Custom config file support
- Creature relationship system with flexible friend/foe settings
- Fast entity attribute registration
- Flexible loot tables directly configurable via the config file

**Planned features:**

- Adding structures via config file with full customization
- Utility framework for accessing entity information
- Background music during boss fights
- Custom books with server-side synchronization



**Help/Support/Suggestions:**

[Join the discord](https://discord.gg/peU9jS8rhA)
